response.global_analysis: The audio is primarily English, matching the on-screen text for the song 'Genesis'. I have used the on-screen text as the absolute guide for spelling and punctuation of the lyrics. The video contains a performance segment followed by a dialogue segment on a beach. I have timed each subtitle block precisely to the vocal audio, ensuring no bleeding into subsequent lines and splitting blocks at natural pauses or to maintain character limits. Dialogue has been transcribed and translated (in this case, transcribed as it is in English) with attention to character identity and tone.

subtitles.original: Everybody, look! It's the beach! Yeah! We're everywhere! It's the beach! Yay! We're everywhere!

subtitles.original: Nerissa: Oh this is nice.
subtitles.english: Nerissa: Oh this is nice.

subtitles.original: Fuwawa: Yeah, I like it.
subtitles.english: Fuwawa: Yeah, I like it.

subtitles.original: Mococo: It feels nice and breathable.
subtitles.english: Mococo: It feels nice and breathable.

subtitles.original: Nerissa: I want to see everyone close up though.

subtitles.original: This is our first time wearing something like this, so Bijou, why don't you show off what you've got?

subtitles.original: Bijou: Me first? Okay!
subtitles.english: Bijou: Me first? Okay!

subtitles.original: Alright, what are you looking at, huh?

subtitles.original: Fine, you can look a little bit, okay? Okay, here we go.
